description: Read-only hardening verification baseline for Juniper Junos network switches. The agent collects Junos set-format configuration over SSH and checks management-plane, authentication, logging, SNMP, NTP, and control-plane protections.

controls.check: Junos SSH service should be enabled.
controls.remediation: set system services ssh

controls.check: Telnet must not be enabled because it sends credentials in clear text.
controls.remediation: delete system services telnet

controls.check: Plain HTTP management must not be enabled.
controls.remediation: delete system services web-management http

controls.expected: HTTPS only when J-Web is required
controls.check: If J-Web is used, HTTPS should be configured instead of HTTP.
controls.remediation: set system services web-management https system-generated-certificate

controls.expected: NETCONF over SSH only when automation requires it
controls.check: NETCONF should run over SSH if network automation is used.
controls.remediation: set system services netconf ssh

controls.check: Root authentication must use encrypted password or SSH key material, never plain text.
controls.remediation: set system root-authentication encrypted-password <hash> or set system root-authentication ssh-ed25519 <key>

controls.expected: all local users use encrypted-password or SSH keys
controls.check: Local user accounts must not use plain-text-password configuration.
controls.remediation: delete system login user <user> authentication plain-text-password; set encrypted-password or ssh public key

controls.expected: authentication-order includes radius, tacplus, or password fallback by policy
controls.check: Authentication order should be explicitly configured for centralized AAA or documented local fallback.
controls.remediation: set system authentication-order radius; set system radius-server <ip> secret <secret>

controls.check: Login retry policy should limit brute-force attempts.
controls.remediation: set system login retry-options tries-before-disconnect 3; set system login retry-options backoff-threshold 3

controls.expected: idle-timeout configured for interactive admin classes
controls.check: Interactive login classes should have idle-timeout to reduce abandoned session risk.
controls.remediation: set system login class <class> idle-timeout 10

controls.expected: super-user access limited to named admin accounts
controls.check: At least one named administrator should be configured; shared root-only administration should be avoided.
controls.remediation: set system login user <admin> class super-user authentication ssh-ed25519 <key>

controls.check: Switch should forward logs to a centralized syslog/SIEM collector.
controls.remediation: set system syslog host <syslog-ip> any info; set system syslog host <syslog-ip> authorization info

controls.check: Junos should log interactive admin commands.
controls.remediation: set system syslog file interactive-commands interactive-commands any

controls.expected: authorization info or any info logging configured
controls.check: Authorization and authentication events should be logged.
controls.remediation: set system syslog file messages authorization info

controls.expected: at least one NTP server configured
controls.check: NTP should be configured for accurate log correlation.
controls.remediation: set system ntp server <ntp-ip-or-fqdn>

controls.check: Timezone should be explicitly configured.
controls.remediation: set system time-zone Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh

controls.check: Default SNMP communities must not exist.
controls.remediation: delete snmp community public; delete snmp community private

controls.expected: SNMP communities restricted to client-list or clients
controls.check: If SNMP community is used, access should be restricted to monitoring collectors.
controls.remediation: set snmp community <community> client-list-name <list> or migrate to SNMPv3

controls.expected: SNMPv3 configured when SNMP is required
controls.check: SNMPv3 should be preferred over community-based SNMP.
controls.remediation: set snmp v3 usm local-engine user <user> authentication-sha ...

controls.check: A firewall filter should protect the routing engine/control plane.
match_any: ^set interfaces lo0 unit 0 family inet filter input
controls.remediation: set interfaces lo0 unit 0 family inet filter input <protect-re-filter>

controls.expected: control-plane filter restricts SSH management sources
controls.check: Control-plane filter should explicitly match SSH management sources.
match_any: ^set firewall family inet filter .* term .* from source-address
^set firewall family inet filter .* term .* from source-prefix-list
controls.remediation: Add source-address/source-prefix-list terms to the lo0 input filter for SSH/management protocols.

controls.check: Configuration changes should be archived automatically after commit.
controls.remediation: set system archival configuration transfer-on-commit; set system archival configuration archive-sites scp://user@server/path password <secret>

controls.check: Login announcement should warn that the device is for authorized use only.
controls.remediation: set system login announcement "Authorized access only. Activity may be monitored."

controls.check: Agent must be able to read Junos version for inventory and audit evidence.
controls.remediation: Ensure SSH user has permission to run show version.

controls.expected: show system commit returns commit history
controls.check: Agent should be able to read commit history for change audit evidence.
controls.remediation: Ensure SSH user has permission to run show system commit.
